name: Starter Planning
description: Template prompts for concrete planning and prioritisation.

prompts.title: Unstick a project
prompts.prompt: I have too many possible next steps and I keep circling. Help me pick the next three actions that would create real momentum.

prompts.title: Realistic day plan
prompts.prompt: Help me plan a day where I need to make progress, but I know my energy is limited and I cannot pretend I will be a productivity machine.

prompts.title: Prioritise features
prompts.prompt: I have ten feature ideas for a small app. How should I decide which ones belong in the first version?

prompts.title: Reduce scope
prompts.prompt: This plan is too big. Help me cut it down without losing the actual goal.

prompts.title: Decision plan
prompts.prompt: I need to choose between two options and I keep collecting more information. Build me a practical decision process with a stopping point.
